name: servicetitan-mcp
description: Connect Claude to ServiceTitan: jobs, customers, invoices, estimates, dispatch, pricebook, payroll, memberships, and reporting.

tenant1_name.title: Tenant 1 — Name
tenant1_name.description: Short lowercase nickname for this ServiceTitan tenant (letters, digits, - or _; e.g. acme). You'll use this name when talking to Claude.

tenant1_id.title: Tenant 1 — Tenant ID
tenant1_id.description: Numeric tenant ID from the ServiceTitan developer portal (Integrations > API Application Access).

tenant1_client_secret.title: Tenant 1 — Client Secret
tenant1_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret (starts with cs1. or cs2.). Stored in your OS keychain.

tenant1_app_key.title: Tenant 1 — App Key
tenant1_app_key.description: Application key from the developer portal. Stored in your OS keychain.

tenant2_name.title: Tenant 2 — Name (optional)
tenant2_name.description: Leave blank if you only have one ServiceTitan tenant.

tenant2_id.title: Tenant 2 — Tenant ID
tenant2_id.description: Required only if Tenant 2 name is set.

tenant2_client_id.title: Tenant 2 — Client ID
tenant2_client_id.description: Required only if Tenant 2 name is set.

tenant2_client_secret.title: Tenant 2 — Client Secret
tenant2_client_secret.description: Required only if Tenant 2 name is set.

tenant2_app_key.title: Tenant 2 — App Key
tenant2_app_key.description: Required only if Tenant 2 name is set.

tenant3_id.title: Tenant 3 — Tenant ID
tenant3_id.description: Required only if Tenant 3 name is set.

tenant3_client_id.title: Tenant 3 — Client ID
tenant3_client_id.description: Required only if Tenant 3 name is set.

tenant3_client_secret.title: Tenant 3 — Client Secret
tenant3_client_secret.description: Required only if Tenant 3 name is set.

tenant3_app_key.title: Tenant 3 — App Key
tenant3_app_key.description: Required only if Tenant 3 name is set.

tenant4_id.title: Tenant 4 — Tenant ID
tenant4_id.description: Required only if Tenant 4 name is set.

tenant4_client_id.title: Tenant 4 — Client ID
tenant4_client_id.description: Required only if Tenant 4 name is set.

tenant4_client_secret.title: Tenant 4 — Client Secret
tenant4_client_secret.description: Required only if Tenant 4 name is set.

tenant4_app_key.title: Tenant 4 — App Key
tenant4_app_key.description: Required only if Tenant 4 name is set.

tenant5_id.title: Tenant 5 — Tenant ID
tenant5_id.description: Required only if Tenant 5 name is set.

tenant5_client_id.title: Tenant 5 — Client ID
tenant5_client_id.description: Required only if Tenant 5 name is set.

tenant5_client_secret.title: Tenant 5 — Client Secret
tenant5_client_secret.description: Required only if Tenant 5 name is set.

tenant5_app_key.title: Tenant 5 — App Key
tenant5_app_key.description: Required only if Tenant 5 name is set.

outputs_dir.title: Report export folder
outputs_dir.description: Where run_report_to_file saves CSV/JSONL report exports.
